Tiny PDF Tools

Free, private, client-side PDF utilities. No uploads required.

✨ 100% Free & Private — No Uploads

Lightweight & Free PDF Tools

Looking for lightweight PDF tools? Tiny PDF Tools lets you merge, split, compress, sign, and convert PDFs entirely in your browser. Whether you need a tiny pdf merge or to compress files for email, everything is 100% free with no server uploads.

Merge PDF

Combine multiple PDF files into a single document. Drag to reorder pages.

Split PDF

Extract specific pages or split a PDF into separate files.

Compress PDF

Reduce PDF file size by optimizing embedded images. Perfect for email.

PDF to Image

Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG or PNG images.

Image to PDF

Combine JPG, PNG, or WebP images into a single PDF document.

Rotate PDF

Rotate all pages by 90°, 180°, or 270°. Lossless and instant.

Protect PDF

Add password protection with AES-256 encryption to secure your PDFs.

Unlock PDF

Remove password protection from PDFs you own. Enter password, get unlocked copy.

Watermark PDF

Add text watermarks with custom size, opacity, rotation, and color.

Organize PDF

Drag and drop to rearrange pages, delete unwanted pages, or duplicate them.

Add Page Numbers

Stamp page numbers on every page. Choose position, format, and style.

Crop PDF

Visually trim margins or cut specific areas from PDF pages. Drag to crop.

Delete Pages

Remove unwanted pages from your PDF. Click to select, download the trimmed file.

Flatten PDF

Merge form fields and annotations into a static, non-editable document.

Sign PDF

Draw or type your signature and place it on any page of your PDF.

Extract Pages

Select and extract specific pages from a PDF into a new file.

PDF Reader

Open and read PDFs in your browser. Zoom, navigate, rotate, and search.

🔒 No file uploads
⚡ Instant processing
♾️ Unlimited usage
🆓 100% free

How It Works

Every tool follows the same simple, three-step process. No accounts, no installations, no waiting.

1

Choose Your Tool

Select any of the 16 PDF tools above. Each tool is purpose-built for a specific task — from merging and splitting to signing and encrypting. Click the tool card to get started instantly.

2

Upload Your PDF

Drag and drop your PDF file onto the upload area, or click to browse your device. The file loads directly into your browser's memory — it is never sent to any external server or cloud storage.

3

Download the Result

Make your changes and click the action button. The processed PDF downloads directly to your device in seconds. The original file is never modified, preserved, or stored anywhere — once you close the tab, it is gone.

Why Client-Side Processing Matters

Most PDF tools upload your files to remote servers for processing. That means your contracts, financial statements, medical records, and personal documents pass through third-party infrastructure you cannot audit or control. Tiny PDF Tools takes a fundamentally different approach.

FeatureServer-Based ToolsTiny PDF Tools
File handlingUploaded to remote serversNever leaves your device
Account requiredYes — email + passwordNo account needed
Data retentionFiles may be storedZero data retention
Usage limits2–5 tasks/day (free tier)Unlimited, always
Cost$12–$23/month$0 — forever free
Privacy verificationTrust the providerCheck Network tab (F12)

How to verify: Open Developer Tools (F12 → Network tab), process any PDF, and inspect the network log. You will see zero outgoing file transfers. This is not a marketing promise — it is a verifiable technical fact.

16
Free PDF Tools
0
Files Uploaded
0
Accounts Required
∞
Usage Limit

Frequently Asked Questions

Are all 16 PDF tools really free?

Yes. Every tool on Tiny PDF Tools is completely free with no usage limits, no daily caps, and no premium tiers. There is no account to create and nothing to install. We generate revenue through non-intrusive display ads, which allows us to keep every tool free for everyone.

Do my PDF files get uploaded to a server?

No. Every tool processes files 100% in your browser using JavaScript and the pdf-lib library. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this yourself by opening Developer Tools (F12), going to the Network tab, and processing any PDF — you will see zero file uploads.

What browsers and devices are supported?

Tiny PDF Tools works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari, and Brave. The tools work on desktop computers, laptops, tablets, and mobile phones. No software installation or browser extension is required.

Is there a file size limit for PDFs?

There is no hard file size limit. Since all processing happens in your browser's memory, very large PDFs (over 100 MB) may take longer to process depending on your device's available RAM. For most documents under 50 MB, processing is near-instant.

How is this different from Adobe Acrobat or Smallpdf?

The key difference is privacy and cost. Adobe Acrobat costs $22.99/month and requires account creation. Smallpdf limits free users to 2 tasks per day and uploads files to their servers. Tiny PDF Tools is completely free, requires no account, and processes everything in your browser — your files never touch a remote server.

Can I use these tools for business and commercial documents?

Absolutely. Many professionals use Tiny PDF Tools for contracts, invoices, proposals, and financial reports. Since files are processed entirely in your browser, there is no risk of data exposure through third-party servers. This makes our tools particularly well-suited for sensitive business documents.
